g.title: LGod of War (2018) LODLAM ontology|Language: en

LOntology for the LODLAM project on the God of War (2018) Wikipedia page. Reuses schema.org, dcterms, FOAF, SKOS, and DBO; adds one coined property (gow:reinterprets) for the fictional-adaptation-of-myth relation.|Language: en
g.text: Ontology for the LODLAM project on the God of War (2018) Wikipedia page. Reuses schema.org, dcterms, FOAF, SKOS, and DBO; adds one coined property (gow:reinterprets) for the fictional-adaptation-of-myth relation.

g.title: Rhttps://alicesgarlata.github.io/gowlodlam->LOntology for the LODLAM project on the God of War (2018) Wikipedia page. Reuses schema.org, dcterms, FOAF, SKOS, and DBO; adds one coined property (gow:reinterprets) for the fictional-adaptation-of-myth relation.|Language: en
LRelates a character in the game to the mythological figure they are based on. Used instead of owl:sameAs when the Wikidata entry describes the myth figure, not the fictional character.|Language: en
g.text: Relates a character in the game to the mythological figure they are based on. Used instead of owl:sameAs when the Wikidata entry describes the myth figure, not the fictional character.
